item.title: See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: Team USA wins gold and silver in women's moguls at Winter Olympics
item.description: Gold medalist Elizabeth Lemley is making her Winter Olympics debut at the Milan Cortina Games.

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 11, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance your current one? These are the mortgage interest rates you need to know now.

item.title: El Paso airspace closure was tied to Mexican cartel drones, officials say
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration changed course and said flights would resume after halting all air traffic into and out of El Paso.

item.title: Watch Live: Bondi testifies at House hearing amid scrutiny over Epstein files
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi is appearing before the House Judiciary Committee as the Justice Department faces questions over the Epstein files.
